---
title: One Vault Across Devices — Syncing Notes, Projects, and Agent Memory over Git
author: Chris Kornaros
date: 2026-06-07
categories:
- blog
- guide
published: '2026-06-07'
---

```{=html}
<div class="substack-post-embed"><p lang="en">One Vault Across Devices — Syncing Notes, Projects, and Agent Memory over Git by Chris Kornaros</p><p></p><a data-post-link href="https://chriskornaros.substack.com/p/one-obsidian-vault-across-devices">Read on Substack</a></div><script async src="https://substack.com/embedjs/embed.js" charset="utf-8"></script>
```
